name: Mary - Herrenknecht EPB TBM S-1124
description: Earth Pressure Balance Tunnel Boring Machine. 21.8-foot OD cutting diameter. Conveyance screw 18-inch diameter. 12,800 kW installed power. Mixed face capability for Chicago Blue Clay and Dolomite interface. 6-digit segment erector. Foam injection system for EPB conditioning. Maximum advance rate 24 rings/day in ideal conditions.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

name: Main Gantry Train - 2 sets
description: Rolling stock behind TBM. Carries precast segments muck skips electrical power transformers ventilation ducting. 800-foot train length per set. Rack and pinion locomotive 2x48v battery.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

name: Surface Segment Crane - 80-ton Liebherr LTM 1090
description: Mobile crane dedicated to launching shaft segment handling. Lifts 11-ton lining rings from delivery truck to segment storage yard to lowering frame.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

name: Launching Shaft Gantry - 60-ton
description: Fixed gantry over the 60x40-foot EPB launching shaft at 103rd St. Lowers segment rings and TBM components. 60-ton capacity. 50-foot lift.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

name: Muck Handling - Belt Conveyor System 1800ft
description: Surface conveyor from shaft head to muck handling facility. Handles ~800 CY/day of Chicago Blue Clay spoil. Enclosed belt to minimize dust. Connects to 6-wheel dump trucks for disposal.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

name: Tunnel Ventilation - Primary Fan 150HP x4
description: Four 150HP axial fans for fresh air supply to TBM face. MSHA standard underground ventilation. Ducting follows train gantry to within 200 feet of cutterhead.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

name: Grout Plant - Dual-Drum Colloidal Mixer
description: Annular backfill grout batching plant at surface. Produces 2-part grout (A+B) for immediate annular grouting behind TBM shield tail. Capacity 80 CY/hr.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel

name: Dewatering System - 18 Deep Wells 60HP Pumps
description: Wellpoint system at launching shaft and extraction shaft. 18 wells to 85-foot depth. Maintains groundwater drawdown during shaft excavation and TBM intervention. IEPA permit required.
project_name: CTA Red Line Extension Utility Relocation Tunnel
